name: Quinoa: Basic Cooking Instructions
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinse quinoa thoroughly in a small strainer or by running fresh water over the quinoa in a pot. Drain.
2. Add quinoa and water to 1 1/2-quart saucepan; bring to boil.
3. Reduce heat to simmer; cover and cook until all water is absorbed (10-15 minutes). When done, the grain appears translucent and the germ ring will be visible.
Yield: 4 cups
Recipe tested on 12 oz box of Ancient Harvest brand quinoa. Distributed by Quinoa Corporation World Headquarters/P.O. Box 1039/Torrance, CA 90505.
